ГўвЂќвЂљ     Гўв‚¬Вў Chrome 90+                                                ГўвЂќвЂљ
ГўвЂќвЂљ     Гўв‚¬Вў Firefox 88+                                               ГўвЂќвЂљ
ГўвЂќвЂљ     Гўв‚¬Вў Safari 14+                                                ГўвЂќвЂљ

ГўвЂќвЂљ                                                                 ГўвЂќвЂљ
ГўвЂќвЂљ     [View Read-Only Dashboard] (limited functionality)          ГўвЂќвЂљ
ГўвЂќвЂљ                                                                 ГўвЂќвЂљ
ГўвЂќвЂќГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќЛњ
```

---

## 6.11 Performance Requirements

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Initial load | <3s | Time to first meaningful paint |
| Canvas render | 60 FPS | Frame rate during pan/zoom |
| Data points | 500,000+ | Maximum renderable PM blocks |
| Interaction response | <100ms | Time from click to visual feedback |
| API response display | <500ms | Time from API response to UI update |
| Memory usage | <1GB | Maximum heap size |

### 6.11.1 Optimization Strategies

```typescript
const PERFORMANCE_OPTIMIZATIONS = {
  // Data loading
  virtualScrolling: true,           // Only render visible train rows
  tileBasedLoading: true,           // Load canvas data in tiles
  progressiveLoading: true,         // Load coarse data first, refine
  
  // Rendering
  webWorkerCalculations: true,      // Offload heavy math to workers
  gpuAcceleration: true,            // Use WebGL via deck.gl
  memoizedFiltering: true,          // Cache filtered datasets
  levelOfDetail: true,              // Reduce detail at low zoom
  
  // Caching
  apiResponseCache: '5m',           // Cache API responses
  canvasDataCache: '1m',            // Cache canvas tile data
  userPreferencesCache: 'session',  // Cache user settings
};
```

    35в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ…вЂ™ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‚Вђ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ…вЂ™ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‚Вђ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ…вЂ™ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‚Вђ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    36в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   STRATEGIC     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   MAN-HOUR      ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ    COSTING      ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    37в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   PLANNER       ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎГѓВўГўв‚¬вЂќГўв‚¬ЕѕГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬вЂњГ‚ВєГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   LEVELING      ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎГѓВўГўв‚¬вЂќГўв‚¬ЕѕГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬вЂњГ‚ВєГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ    SERVICE      ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    38в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                 ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ENGINE        ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                 ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    39в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў 10-year       ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Projections   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў TCO forecast  ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    40в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў GA heuristic  ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Adjustments   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Variance      ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    41в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Envelope      ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Multi-strat   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Budgeting     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    42в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    43в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ            ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                       ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                       ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                    ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ

    45в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ…вЂ™ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‚Вђ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ…вЂ™ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‚Вђ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ…вЂ™ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‚Вђ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ

    48в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                 ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                 ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                 ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    49в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Snapshots     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Nightly       ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Scenarios     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
    50в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Publishing    ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў Thresholds    ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ ГѓВўГўвЂљВ¬Г‚Вў What-if       ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ

    52в†’ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ

    59в†’## 4.2 Ingestion Service

    61в†’### 4.2.1 Purpose
    62в†’
    63в†’Process daily CSV files containing mileage data, validate records, handle meter events, and update the database.
    64в†’

    82в†’    this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.config.inboxPath, {
    83в†’      persistent: true,
    84в†’      awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 2000, pollInterval: 500 }
    85в†’    });
    86в†’    
    87в†’    this.watcher.on('add', async (filePath) => {
    88в†’      this.lastFileReceivedAt = new Date();
    89в†’      await this.processFile(filePath);
    90в†’    });
    91в†’    
    92в†’    // Health check interval
    93в†’    setInterval(() => this.checkFileArrivalHealth(), 30 * 60 * 1000);
    94в†’  }
    95в†’  
    96в†’  private async processFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    97в†’    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    98в†’    const jobId = crypto.randomUUID();
    99в†’    
   100в†’    try {
   101в†’      // Validate file
   102в†’      await this.validateFile(filePath);
   103в†’      
   104в†’      // Queue for processing
   105в†’      await this.jobQueue.add('ingestion', {
   106в†’        jobId,
   107в†’        filePath,
   108в†’        filename,
   109в†’        receivedAt: new Date().toISOString()
   110в†’      }, {
   111в†’        attempts: 3,
   112в†’        backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 5000 }
   113в†’      });
   114в†’      
   115в†’      this.logger.info({ jobId, filename }, 'File queued for ingestion');
   116в†’      
   117в†’    } catch (error) {
   118в†’      // Move to quarantine
   119в†’      const quarantinePath = path.join(
   120в†’        this.config.quarantinePath, 
   121в†’        `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
   122в†’      );
   123в†’      await fs.rename(filePath, quarantinePath);
   124в†’      
   125в†’      this.logger.error({ filename, error }, 'File quarantined');
   126в†’      
   127в†’      await this.alertService.send({
   128в†’        type: 'FILE_VALIDATION_FAILED',
   129в†’        severity: 'WARNING',
   130в†’        message: `File ${filename} failed validation: ${error.message}`,
   131в†’        filePath: quarantinePath
   132в†’      });
   133в†’    }
   134в†’  }
   135в†’  
   136в†’  private async validateFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
   137в†’    const stats = await fs.stat(filePath);
   138в†’    
   139в†’    // Size check
   140в†’    if (stats.size > this.config.maxFileSizeBytes) {
   141в†’      throw new Error(`File exceeds maximum size: ${stats.size} bytes`);
   142в†’    }
   143в†’    
   144в†’    // Format check
   145в†’    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
   146в†’    if (!this.config.expectedFilePattern.test(filename)) {
   147в†’      throw new Error(`Filename does not match expected pattern: ${filename}`);
   148в†’    }
   149в†’    
   150в†’    // Content check (first 10 lines)
   151в†’    const sample = await this.readFirstLines(filePath, 10);
   152в†’    await this.validateCSVStructure(sample);
   153в†’  }
   154в†’  
   155в†’  private async checkFileArrivalHealth(): Promise<void> {
   156в†’    if (!this.lastFileReceivedAt) return;
   157в†’    
   158в†’    const hoursSinceLastFile = 
   159в†’      (Date.now() - this.lastFileReceivedAt.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
   160в†’    
   161в†’    if (hoursSinceLastFile > this.config.alertThresholdHours) {
   162в†’      await this.alertService.send({
   163в†’        type: 'FILE_ARRIVAL_DELAYED',
   164в†’        severity: 'WARNING',
   165в†’        message: `No mileage files received in ${hoursSinceLastFile.toFixed(1)} hours`,
   166в†’        lastFileAt: this.lastFileReceivedAt.toISOString(),
   167в†’        expectedInterval: `${this.config.alertThresholdHours} hours`
   168в†’      });
   169в†’    }
   170в†’  }
   171в†’}
   172в†’```
   173в†’
   174в†’### 4.2.3 Ingestion Worker
   175в†’
   176в†’```typescript
   177в†’interface MileageRecord {
   178в†’  trainNumber: string;
   179в†’  readingDate: string;  // YYYY-MM-DD
   180в†’  odometerValue: number;
   181в†’  source?: string;
   182в†’}
   183в†’
   184в†’interface IngestionResult {
   185в†’  jobId: string;
   186в†’  filename: string;
   187в†’  totalRecords: number;
   188в†’  validRecords: number;
   189в†’  invalidRecords: number;
   190в†’  anomalies: AnomalyRecord[];
   191в†’  meterEvents: MeterEventRecord[];
   192в†’  processingTimeMs: number;
   193в†’}
   194в†’
   195в†’class IngestionWorker {
   196в†’  async process(job: Job<IngestionJobData>): Promise<IngestionResult> {
   197в†’    const startTime = Date.now();
   198в†’    const { jobId, filePath, filename } = job.data;
   199в†’    
   200в†’    const result: IngestionResult = {
   201в†’      jobId,
   202в†’      filename,
   203в†’      totalRecords: 0,
   204в†’      validRecords: 0,
   205в†’      invalidRecords: 0,
   206в†’      anomalies: [],
   207в†’      meterEvents: [],
   208в†’      processingTimeMs: 0
   209в†’    };
   210в†’    
   211в†’    // Parse CSV
   212в†’    const records = await this.parseCSV(filePath);
   213в†’    result.totalRecords = records.length;
   214в†’    
   215в†’    // Process in batches
   216в†’    const batches = this.chunk(records, 100);
   217в†’    
   218в†’    for (const batch of batches) {
   219в†’      await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   220в†’        for (const record of batch) {
   221в†’          try {
   222в†’            await this.processRecord(tx, record, result);
   223в†’            result.validRecords++;
   224в†’          } catch (error) {
   225в†’            result.invalidRecords++;
   226в†’            this.logger.warn({ record, error }, 'Record processing failed');
   227в†’          }
   228в†’        }
   229в†’      });
   230в†’    }
   231в†’    
   232в†’    // Move file to processed
   233в†’    const processedPath = path.join(
   234в†’      this.config.processedPath,
   235в†’      `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
   236в†’    );
   237в†’    await fs.rename(filePath, processedPath);
   238в†’    
   239в†’    // Update train current mileage
   240в†’    await this.updateTrainMileage(records);
   241в†’    
   242в†’    // Trigger downstream processing
   243в†’    await this.triggerDriftCheck();
   244в†’    
   245в†’    result.processingTimeMs = Date.now() - startTime;
   246в†’    
   247в†’    return result;
   248в†’  }
   249в†’  
   250в†’  private async processRecord(
   251в†’    tx: Transaction,
   252в†’    record: MileageRecord,
   253в†’    result: IngestionResult
   254в†’  ): Promise<void> {
   255в†’    // Find train
   256в†’    const train = await tx.query.trains.findFirst({
   257в†’      where: eq(trains.trainNumber, record.trainNumber)
   258в†’    });
   259в†’    
   260в†’    if (!train) {
   261в†’      throw new Error(`Unknown train: ${record.trainNumber}`);
   262в†’    }
   263в†’    
   264в†’    // Get previous reading
   265в†’    const previousReading = await tx.query.mileageReadings.findFirst({
   266в†’      where: and(
   267в†’        eq(mileageReadings.trainId, train.id),
   268в†’        lt(mileageReadings.readingDate, record.readingDate)
   269в†’      ),
   270в†’      orderBy: desc(mileageReadings.readingDate)
   271в†’    });
   272в†’    
   273в†’    // Calculate adjusted value (handle meter events)
   274в†’    const adjustment = await this.getMeterAdjustment(tx, train.id, record.readingDate);
   275в†’    const adjustedReading = record.odometerValue + adjustment;
   276в†’    
   277в†’    // Calculate daily km
   278в†’    let dailyKm: number | null = null;
   279в†’    let anomalyType: string | null = null;
   280в†’    
   281в†’    if (previousReading) {
   282в†’      dailyKm = adjustedReading - previousReading.adjustedReading;
   283в†’      
   284в†’      // Anomaly detection
   285в†’      if (dailyKm < 0) {
   286в†’        anomalyType = 'NEGATIVE';
   287в†’        result.anomalies.push({
   288в†’          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
   289в†’          date: record.readingDate,
   290в†’          type: 'NEGATIVE',
   291в†’          value: dailyKm,
   292в†’          message: `Negative daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
   293в†’        });
   294в†’      } else if (dailyKm > 1000) {  // Spike threshold
   295в†’        anomalyType = 'SPIKE';
   296в†’        result.anomalies.push({
   297в†’          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
   298в†’          date: record.readingDate,
   299в†’          type: 'SPIKE',
   300в†’          value: dailyKm,
   301в†’          message: `Unusually high daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
   302в†’        });
   303в†’      }
   304в†’    }
   305в†’    
   306в†’    // Insert or update reading
   307в†’    await tx.insert(mileageReadings)
   308в†’      .values({
   309в†’        trainId: train.id,
   310в†’        readingDate: record.readingDate,
   311в†’        rawReading: record.odometerValue,
   312в†’        adjustedReading,
   313в†’        dailyKm,
   314в†’        validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
   315в†’        anomalyType,
   316в†’        sourceFile: result.filename
   317в†’      })
   318в†’      .onConflictDoUpdate({
   319в†’        target: [mileageReadings.trainId, mileageReadings.readingDate],
   320в†’        set: {
   321в†’          rawReading: record.odometerValue,
   322в†’          adjustedReading,
   323в†’          dailyKm,
   324в†’          validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
   325в†’          anomalyType,
   326в†’          sourceFile: result.filename
   327в†’        }
   328в†’      });
   329в†’  }
   330в†’  
   331в†’  private async getMeterAdjustment(
   332в†’    tx: Transaction,
   333в†’    trainId: string,
   334в†’    asOfDate: string
   335в†’  ): Promise<number> {
   336в†’    // Sum all meter event adjustments up to this date
   337в†’    const events = await tx.query.meterEvents.findMany({
   338в†’      where: and(
   339в†’        eq(meterEvents.trainId, trainId),
   340в†’        lte(meterEvents.eventDate, asOfDate)
   341в†’      )
   342в†’    });
   343в†’    
   344в†’    return events.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.adjustmentKm || 0), 0);
   345в†’  }
   346в†’  
   347в†’  private async updateTrainMileage(records: MileageRecord[]): Promise<void> {
   348в†’    // Group by train, find latest reading
   349в†’    const latestByTrain = new Map<string, MileageRecord>();
   350в†’    
   351в†’    for (const record of records) {
   352в†’      const existing = latestByTrain.get(record.trainNumber);
   353в†’      if (!existing || record.readingDate > existing.readingDate) {
   354в†’        latestByTrain.set(record.trainNumber, record);
   355в†’      }
   356в†’    }
   357в†’    
   358в†’    // Update train current_mileage
   359в†’    for (const [trainNumber, record] of latestByTrain) {
   360в†’      await this.db.update(trains)
   361в†’        .set({ 
   362в†’          currentMileageKm: record.odometerValue,
   363в†’          updatedAt: new Date()
   364в†’        })
   365в†’        .where(eq(trains.trainNumber, trainNumber));
   366в†’    }
   367в†’    
   368в†’    // Update fleet mileage targets
   369в†’    await this.db.execute(sql`SELECT update_fleet_mileage_targets()`);
   370в†’  }
   371в†’}
   372в†’```
   373в†’
   374в†’---
   375в†’
   376в†’## 4.2.5 Unavailability Service (NEW v2.1)
   377в†’
   378в†’### 4.2.5.1 Purpose
   379в†’
   380в†’Track trains that are unavailable due to corrective maintenance, incidents, or other blocking factors. This service is **critical** for schedule validity - without it, the optimizer can schedule PMs for trains that are grounded for weeks.
   381в†’
   382в†’### 4.2.5.2 Implementation
   383в†’
   384в†’```typescript
   385в†’interface UnavailabilityEvent {
   386в†’  id: string;
   387в†’  trainId: string;
   388в†’  eventType: 'CORRECTIVE' | 'INCIDENT' | 'COLLISION' | 'VANDALISM' | 'EXTERNAL' | 'PLANNED_OUTAGE';
   389в†’  status: 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED';
   390в†’  restrictionLevel: 'RESTRICTED' | 'GROUNDED';
   391в†’  
   392в†’  reportedAt: Date;
   393в†’  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
   394в†’  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
   395в†’  actualReturnDate?: Date;
   396в†’  
   397в†’  sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO' | 'OCC' | 'MANUAL';
   398в†’  externalReference?: string;   // Maximo WO number
   399в†’  externalStatus?: string;      // Maximo status
   400в†’  
   401в†’  description?: string;
   402в†’  failureCode?: string;
   403в†’  affectedSystem?: string;
   404в†’  
   405в†’  blocksPmScheduling: boolean;
   406в†’  blocksRunAssignment: boolean;
   407в†’}
   408в†’
   409в†’interface CreateUnavailabilityInput {
   410в†’  trainId: string;
   411в†’  eventType: UnavailabilityEvent['eventType'];
   412в†’  restrictionLevel: UnavailabilityEvent['restrictionLevel'];
   413в†’  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
   414в†’  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
   415в†’  sourceSystem: UnavailabilityEvent['sourceSystem'];
   416в†’  externalReference?: string;
   417в†’  description?: string;
   418в†’  affectedSystem?: string;
   419в†’}
   420в†’
   421в†’class UnavailabilityService {
   422в†’  constructor(
   423в†’    private db: Database,
   424в†’    private alertService: AlertService,
   425в†’    private auditService: AuditService
   426в†’  ) {}
   427в†’  
   428в†’  /**
   429в†’   * Create a new unavailability event (e.g., from Maximo webhook)
   430в†’   */
   431в†’  async createEvent(input: CreateUnavailabilityInput, userId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent> {
   432в†’    const event = await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   433в†’      // 1. Create the unavailability event
   434в†’      const [newEvent] = await tx
   435в†’        .insert(unavailabilityEvents)
   436в†’        .values({
   437в†’          ...input,
   438в†’          status: 'ACTIVE',
   439в†’          reportedAt: new Date(),
   440в†’          blocksPmScheduling: true,
   441в†’          blocksRunAssignment: input.restrictionLevel === 'GROUNDED',
   442в†’        })
   443в†’        .returning();
   444в†’      
   445в†’      // 2. Update train fitness status (trigger handles this, but we can be explicit)
   446в†’      await tx
   447в†’        .update(trains)
   448в†’        .set({
   449в†’          fitnessStatus: input.restrictionLevel,
   450в†’          fitnessNotes: input.description || `Unavailability: ${input.eventType}`,
   451в†’          updatedAt: new Date()
   452в†’        })
   453в†’        .where(eq(trains.id, input.trainId));
   454в†’      
   455в†’      // 3. Check for conflicts with scheduled PMs
   456в†’      const conflicts = await this.checkPMConflicts(tx, input.trainId, input.estimatedReturnDate);
   457в†’      
   458в†’      return { event: newEvent, conflicts };
   459в†’    });
   460в†’    
   461в†’    // Alert if PM conflicts exist
   462в†’    if (event.conflicts.length > 0) {
   463в†’      await this.alertService.send({
   464в†’        type: 'UNAVAILABILITY_PM_CONFLICT',
   465в†’        severity: 'WARNING',
   466в†’        message: `Train ${event.event.trainId} unavailable - ${event.conflicts.length} scheduled PMs may be affected`,
   467в†’        data: {
   468в†’          trainId: event.event.trainId,
   469в†’          eventId: event.event.id,
   470в†’          conflictingPMs: event.conflicts.map(pm => ({
   471в†’            pmId: pm.id,
   472в†’            pmType: pm.pmTypeCode,
   473в†’            targetDate: pm.targetDate
   474в†’          }))
   475в†’        }
   476в†’      });
   477в†’    }
   478в†’    
   479в†’    // Audit log
   480в†’    await this.auditService.log({
   481в†’      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
   482в†’      entityId: event.event.id,
   483в†’      action: 'CREATE',
   484в†’      userId,
   485в†’      newValues: event.event
   486в†’    });
   487в†’    
   488в†’    return event.event;
   489в†’  }
   490в†’  
   491в†’  /**
   492в†’   * Resolve an unavailability event (train returns to service)
   493в†’   */
   494в†’  async resolveEvent(
   495в†’    eventId: string, 
   496в†’    actualReturnDate: Date, 
   497в†’    userId: string,
   498в†’    notes?: string
   499в†’  ): Promise<void> {
   500в†’    await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   501в†’      const [event] = await tx
   502в†’        .select()
   503в†’        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   504в†’        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
   505в†’      
   506в†’      if (!event) {
   507в†’        throw new NotFoundError(`Unavailability event ${eventId} not found`);
   508в†’      }
   509в†’      
   510в†’      if (event.status === 'RESOLVED') {
   511в†’        throw new ConflictError('Event already resolved');
   512в†’      }
   513в†’      
   514в†’      // Update the event
   515в†’      await tx
   516в†’        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
   517в†’        .set({
   518в†’          status: 'RESOLVED',
   519в†’          actualReturnDate,
   520в†’          resolvedAt: new Date(),
   521в†’          resolvedBy: userId,
   522в†’          resolutionNotes: notes,
   523в†’          updatedAt: new Date()
   524в†’        })
   525в†’        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
   526в†’      
   527в†’      // Check if there are other active unavailability events for this train
   528в†’      const otherActive = await tx
   529в†’        .select({ count: count() })
   530в†’        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   531в†’        .where(and(
   532в†’          eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, event.trainId),
   533в†’          eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
   534в†’          ne(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId)
   535в†’        ));
   536в†’      
   537в†’      // If no other active events, restore train to FIT
   538в†’      if (otherActive[0].count === 0) {
   539в†’        await tx
   540в†’          .update(trains)
   541в†’          .set({
   542в†’            fitnessStatus: 'FIT',
   543в†’            fitnessNotes: null,
   544в†’            updatedAt: new Date()
   545в†’          })
   546в†’          .where(eq(trains.id, event.trainId));
   547в†’      }
   548в†’    });
   549в†’    
   550в†’    await this.auditService.log({
   551в†’      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
   552в†’      entityId: eventId,
   553в†’      action: 'RESOLVE',
   554в†’      userId,
   555в†’      newValues: { status: 'RESOLVED', actualReturnDate }
   556в†’    });
   557в†’  }
   558в†’  
   559в†’  /**
   560в†’   * Get all active unavailability events (for optimizer input)
   561в†’   */
   562в†’  async getActiveUnavailability(depotId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent[]> {
   563в†’    let query = this.db
   564в†’      .select({
   565в†’        event: unavailabilityEvents,
   566в†’        train: {
   567в†’          trainNumber: trains.trainNumber,
   568в†’          fleetId: trains.fleetId,
   569в†’          currentDepotId: trains.currentDepotId
   570в†’        }
   571в†’      })
   572в†’      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   573в†’      .innerJoin(trains, eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trains.id))
   574в†’      .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'));
   575в†’    
   576в†’    if (depotId) {
   577в†’      query = query.where(eq(trains.currentDepotId, depotId));
   578в†’    }
   579в†’    
   580в†’    const results = await query;
   581в†’    return results.map(r => ({
   582в†’      ...r.event,
   583в†’      trainNumber: r.train.trainNumber,
   584в†’      fleetId: r.train.fleetId
   585в†’    }));
   586в†’  }
   587в†’  
   588в†’  /**
   589в†’   * Check if a specific train is available on a specific date
   590в†’   */
   591в†’  async isTrainAvailable(trainId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<{
   592в†’    available: boolean;
   593в†’    blockingEvent?: UnavailabilityEvent;
   594в†’  }> {
   595в†’    const activeEvents = await this.db
   596в†’      .select()
   597в†’      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   598в†’      .where(and(
   599в†’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trainId),
   600в†’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
   601в†’        or(
   602в†’          isNull(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate),
   603в†’          gte(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate, targetDate)
   604в†’        )
   605в†’      ))
   606в†’      .limit(1);
   607в†’    
   608в†’    if (activeEvents.length > 0) {
   609в†’      return { available: false, blockingEvent: activeEvents[0] };
   610в†’    }
   611в†’    
   612в†’    return { available: true };
   613в†’  }
   614в†’  
   615в†’  /**
   616в†’   * Process Maximo webhook for work order status change
   617в†’   */
   618в†’  async processMaximoWebhook(payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook): Promise<void> {
   619в†’    // Map Maximo work types to our event types
   620в†’    const eventTypeMap: Record<string, UnavailabilityEvent['eventType']> = {
   621в†’      'CM': 'CORRECTIVE',
   622в†’      'EM': 'CORRECTIVE',  // Emergency maintenance
   623в†’      'IN': 'INCIDENT'
   624в†’    };
   625в†’    
   626в†’    if (!eventTypeMap[payload.worktype]) {
   627в†’      // Not a corrective maintenance type, ignore
   628в†’      return;
   629в†’    }
   630в†’    
   631в†’    // Check if we already have an event for this WO
   632в†’    const existing = await this.db
   633в†’      .select()
   634в†’      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
   635в†’      .where(and(
   636в†’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.sourceSystem, 'MAXIMO'),
   637в†’        eq(unavailabilityEvents.externalReference, payload.wonum)
   638в†’      ))
   639в†’      .limit(1);
   640в†’    
   641в†’    if (existing.length > 0) {
   642в†’      // Update existing event based on Maximo status
   643в†’      await this.updateFromMaximo(existing[0], payload);
   644в†’    } else if (payload.status === 'WAPPR' || payload.status === 'INPRG') {
   645в†’      // Create new unavailability event
   646в†’      const train = await this.findTrainByAssetnum(payload.assetnum);
   647в†’      if (!train) {
   648в†’        this.logger.warn({ assetnum: payload.assetnum }, 'Unknown asset in Maximo webhook');
   649в†’        return;
   650в†’      }
   651в†’      
   652в†’      await this.createEvent({
   653в†’        trainId: train.id,
   654в†’        eventType: eventTypeMap[payload.worktype],
   655в†’        restrictionLevel: 'GROUNDED',  // Default to grounded for CM
   656в†’        estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
   657в†’        sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO',
   658в†’        externalReference: payload.wonum,
   659в†’        description: payload.description
   660в†’      });
   661в†’    }
   662в†’  }
   663в†’  
   664в†’  private async updateFromMaximo(
   665в†’    event: UnavailabilityEvent, 
   666в†’    payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook
   667в†’  ): Promise<void> {
   668в†’    const maximoStatusMap: Record<string, 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED'> = {
   669в†’      'WAPPR': 'ACTIVE',
   670в†’      'APPR': 'ACTIVE',
   671в†’      'INPRG': 'ACTIVE',
   672в†’      'COMP': 'RESOLVED',
   673в†’      'CLOSE': 'RESOLVED',
   674в†’      'CAN': 'RESOLVED'
   675в†’    };
   676в†’    
   677в†’    const newStatus = maximoStatusMap[payload.status] || 'ACTIVE';
   678в†’    
   679в†’    if (newStatus === 'RESOLVED' && event.status === 'ACTIVE') {
   680в†’      await this.resolveEvent(
   681в†’        event.id, 
   682в†’        new Date(), 
   683в†’        'SYSTEM_MAXIMO',
   684в†’        `Resolved via Maximo status: ${payload.status}`
   685в†’      );
   686в†’    } else {
   687в†’      // Update estimated return date if changed
   688в†’      await this.db
   689в†’        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
   690в†’        .set({
   691в†’          externalStatus: payload.status,
   692в†’          estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
   693в†’          updatedAt: new Date()
   694в†’        })
   695в†’        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, event.id));
   696в†’    }
   697в†’  }
   698в†’  
   699в†’  private async checkPMConflicts(
   700в†’    tx: Transaction,
   701в†’    trainId: string,
   702в†’    estimatedReturnDate?: Date
   703в†’  ): Promise<PMSchedule[]> {
   704в†’    const endDate = estimatedReturnDate || addDays(new Date(), 90); // Default 90 days
   705в†’    
   706в†’    return tx
   707в†’      .select()
   708в†’      .from(pmSchedule)
   709в†’      .where(and(
   710в†’        eq(pmSchedule.trainId, trainId),
   711в†’        eq(pmSchedule.status, 'SCHEDULED'),
   712в†’        lte(pmSchedule.targetDate, endDate),
   713в†’        isNull(pmSchedule.scenarioId)
   714в†’      ));
   715в†’  }
   716в†’}
   717в†’```
   718в†’
   719в†’---
   720в†’
   721в†’## 4.2.6 Service Demand Service (NEW v2.1)
   722в†’
   723в†’### 4.2.6.1 Purpose
   724в†’
   725в†’Manage fleet availability requirements by day type. This is a **hard constraint** for the optimizer - it cannot approve maintenance schedules that would violate minimum train availability.
   726в†’
   727в†’### 4.2.6.2 Implementation
   728в†’
   729в†’```typescript
   730в†’interface ServiceDemand {
   731в†’  id: string;
   732в†’  fleetId: string;
   733в†’  effectiveDate: Date;
   734в†’  dayType: 'WEEKDAY' | 'SATURDAY' | 'SUNDAY' | 'HOLIDAY';
   735в†’  
   736в†’  minTrainsRequired: number;
   737в†’  peakAmRequirement?: number;
   738в†’  middayRequirement?: number;
   739в†’  peakPmRequirement?: number;
   740в†’  standbyBuffer: number;
   741в†’}
   742в†’
   743в†’interface AvailabilityValidation {
   744в†’  isValid: boolean;
   745в†’  availableTrains: number;
   746в†’  requiredTrains: number;
   747в†’  shortfall: number;
   748в†’  unavailableTrains: string[];  // Train IDs
   749в†’  trainsInMaintenance: string[]; // Train IDs
   750в†’}
   751в†’
   752в†’class ServiceDemandService {
   753в†’  constructor(
   754в†’    private db: Database,
   755в†’    private unavailabilityService: UnavailabilityService
   756в†’  ) {}
   757в†’  
   758в†’  /**
   759в†’   * Get service demand for a specific date
   760в†’   */
   761в†’  async getDemand(fleetId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<ServiceDemand> {
   762в†’    const dayType = this.getDayType(targetDate);
   763в†’    
   764в†’    const demand = await this.db
   765в†’      .select()
   766в†’      .from(serviceDemand)
   767в†’      .where(and(
   768в†’        eq(serviceDemand.fleetId, fleetId),
   769в†’        eq(serviceDemand.dayType, dayType),
   770в†’        lte(serviceDemand.effectiveDate, targetDate)
   771в†’      ))
   772в†’      .orderBy(desc(serviceDemand.effectiveDate))
   773в†’      .limit(1);
   774в†’    
   775в†’    if (demand.length === 0) {
   776в†’      // Return default: 85% of fleet
   777в†’      const fleetSize = await this.getFleetSize(fleetId);
   778в†’      return {
   779в†’        id: 'default',
   780в†’        fleetId,
   781в†’        effectiveDate: targetDate,
   782в†’        dayType,
   783в†’        minTrainsRequired: Math.ceil(fleetSize * 0.85),
   784в†’        standbyBuffer: 2
   785в†’      };
   786в†’    }
   787в†’    
   788в†’    return demand[0];
   789в†’  }
   790в†’  
   791в†’  /**
   792в†’   * Validate that enough trains will be available on a date
   793в†’   */
   794в†’  async validateAvailability(
   795в†’    fleetId: string, 
   796в†’    targetDate: Date,
   797в†’    additionalUnavailable: string[] = []  // Train IDs to exclude (e.g., proposed PM)
   798в†’  ): Promise<AvailabilityValidation> {
   799в†’    const demand = await this.getDemand(fleetId, targetDate);
   800в†’

ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ   ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“     ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“          ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ                                                                                  ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ЕЎ
ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўв‚¬ВќГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГўвЂљВ¬ГѓВўГўв‚¬ВќГ‹Е“

## 4.2 Ingestion Service

### 4.2.1 Purpose

Process daily CSV files containing mileage data, validate records, handle meter events, and update the database.

### 4.2.2 File Watcher

```typescript
interface FileWatcherConfig {
  inboxPath: string;           // /data/inbox
  processedPath: string;       // /data/processed
  quarantinePath: string;      // /data/quarantine
  expectedFilePattern: RegExp; // /^mileage_\d{8}\.csv$/
  maxFileSizeBytes: number;    // 10MB
  alertThresholdHours: number; // 2
}

class FileWatcherService {
  private watcher: FSWatcher;
  private lastFileReceivedAt: Date | null = null;
  
  async start(): Promise<void> {
    this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.config.inboxPath, {
      persistent: true,
      awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 2000, pollInterval: 500 }
    });
    
    this.watcher.on('add', async (filePath) => {
      this.lastFileReceivedAt = new Date();
      await this.processFile(filePath);
    });
    
    // Health check interval
    setInterval(() => this.checkFileArrivalHealth(), 30 * 60 * 1000);
  }
  
  private async processFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    const jobId = crypto.randomUUID();
    
    try {
      // Validate file
      await this.validateFile(filePath);
      
      // Queue for processing
      await this.jobQueue.add('ingestion', {
        jobId,
        filePath,
        filename,
        receivedAt: new Date().toISOString()
      }, {
        attempts: 3,
        backoff: { type: 'exponential', delay: 5000 }
      });
      
      this.logger.info({ jobId, filename }, 'File queued for ingestion');
      
    } catch (error) {
      // Move to quarantine
      const quarantinePath = path.join(
        this.config.quarantinePath, 
        `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
      );
      await fs.rename(filePath, quarantinePath);
      
      this.logger.error({ filename, error }, 'File quarantined');
      
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'FILE_VALIDATION_FAILED',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `File ${filename} failed validation: ${error.message}`,
        filePath: quarantinePath
      });
    }
  }
  
  private async validateFile(filePath: string): Promise<void> {
    const stats = await fs.stat(filePath);
    
    // Size check
    if (stats.size > this.config.maxFileSizeBytes) {
      throw new Error(`File exceeds maximum size: ${stats.size} bytes`);
    }
    
    // Format check
    const filename = path.basename(filePath);
    if (!this.config.expectedFilePattern.test(filename)) {
      throw new Error(`Filename does not match expected pattern: ${filename}`);
    }
    
    // Content check (first 10 lines)
    const sample = await this.readFirstLines(filePath, 10);
    await this.validateCSVStructure(sample);
  }
  
  private async checkFileArrivalHealth(): Promise<void> {
    if (!this.lastFileReceivedAt) return;
    
    const hoursSinceLastFile = 
      (Date.now() - this.lastFileReceivedAt.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);
    
    if (hoursSinceLastFile > this.config.alertThresholdHours) {
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'FILE_ARRIVAL_DELAYED',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `No mileage files received in ${hoursSinceLastFile.toFixed(1)} hours`,
        lastFileAt: this.lastFileReceivedAt.toISOString(),
        expectedInterval: `${this.config.alertThresholdHours} hours`
      });
    }
  }
}
```

### 4.2.3 Ingestion Worker

```typescript
interface MileageRecord {
  trainNumber: string;
  readingDate: string;  // YYYY-MM-DD
  odometerValue: number;
  source?: string;
}

interface IngestionResult {
  jobId: string;
  filename: string;
  totalRecords: number;
  validRecords: number;
  invalidRecords: number;
  anomalies: AnomalyRecord[];
  meterEvents: MeterEventRecord[];
  processingTimeMs: number;
}

class IngestionWorker {
  async process(job: Job<IngestionJobData>): Promise<IngestionResult> {
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const { jobId, filePath, filename } = job.data;
    
    const result: IngestionResult = {
      jobId,
      filename,
      totalRecords: 0,
      validRecords: 0,
      invalidRecords: 0,
      anomalies: [],
      meterEvents: [],
      processingTimeMs: 0
    };
    
    // Parse CSV
    const records = await this.parseCSV(filePath);
    result.totalRecords = records.length;
    
    // Process in batches
    const batches = this.chunk(records, 100);
    
    for (const batch of batches) {
      await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
        for (const record of batch) {
          try {
            await this.processRecord(tx, record, result);
            result.validRecords++;
          } catch (error) {
            result.invalidRecords++;
            this.logger.warn({ record, error }, 'Record processing failed');
          }
        }
      });
    }
    
    // Move file to processed
    const processedPath = path.join(
      this.config.processedPath,
      `${Date.now()}_${filename}`
    );
    await fs.rename(filePath, processedPath);
    
    // Update train current mileage
    await this.updateTrainMileage(records);
    
    // Trigger downstream processing
    await this.triggerDriftCheck();
    
    result.processingTimeMs = Date.now() - startTime;
    
    return result;
  }
  
  private async processRecord(
    tx: Transaction,
    record: MileageRecord,
    result: IngestionResult
  ): Promise<void> {
    // Find train
    const train = await tx.query.trains.findFirst({
      where: eq(trains.trainNumber, record.trainNumber)
    });
    
    if (!train) {
      throw new Error(`Unknown train: ${record.trainNumber}`);
    }
    
    // Get previous reading
    const previousReading = await tx.query.mileageReadings.findFirst({
      where: and(
        eq(mileageReadings.trainId, train.id),
        lt(mileageReadings.readingDate, record.readingDate)
      ),
      orderBy: desc(mileageReadings.readingDate)
    });
    
    // Calculate adjusted value (handle meter events)
    const adjustment = await this.getMeterAdjustment(tx, train.id, record.readingDate);
    const adjustedReading = record.odometerValue + adjustment;
    
    // Calculate daily km
    let dailyKm: number | null = null;
    let anomalyType: string | null = null;
    
    if (previousReading) {
      dailyKm = adjustedReading - previousReading.adjustedReading;
      
      // Anomaly detection
      if (dailyKm < 0) {
        anomalyType = 'NEGATIVE';
        result.anomalies.push({
          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
          date: record.readingDate,
          type: 'NEGATIVE',
          value: dailyKm,
          message: `Negative daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
        });
      } else if (dailyKm > 1000) {  // Spike threshold
        anomalyType = 'SPIKE';
        result.anomalies.push({
          trainNumber: record.trainNumber,
          date: record.readingDate,
          type: 'SPIKE',
          value: dailyKm,
          message: `Unusually high daily mileage: ${dailyKm} km`
        });
      }
    }
    
    // Insert or update reading
    await tx.insert(mileageReadings)
      .values({
        trainId: train.id,
        readingDate: record.readingDate,
        rawReading: record.odometerValue,
        adjustedReading,
        dailyKm,
        validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
        anomalyType,
        sourceFile: result.filename
      })
      .onConflictDoUpdate({
        target: [mileageReadings.trainId, mileageReadings.readingDate],
        set: {
          rawReading: record.odometerValue,
          adjustedReading,
          dailyKm,
          validationStatus: anomalyType ? 'ANOMALY' : 'VALID',
          anomalyType,
          sourceFile: result.filename
        }
      });
  }
  
  private async getMeterAdjustment(
    tx: Transaction,
    trainId: string,
    asOfDate: string
  ): Promise<number> {
    // Sum all meter event adjustments up to this date
    const events = await tx.query.meterEvents.findMany({
      where: and(
        eq(meterEvents.trainId, trainId),
        lte(meterEvents.eventDate, asOfDate)
      )
    });
    
    return events.reduce((sum, e) => sum + (e.adjustmentKm || 0), 0);
  }
  
  private async updateTrainMileage(records: MileageRecord[]): Promise<void> {
    // Group by train, find latest reading
    const latestByTrain = new Map<string, MileageRecord>();
    
    for (const record of records) {
      const existing = latestByTrain.get(record.trainNumber);
      if (!existing || record.readingDate > existing.readingDate) {
        latestByTrain.set(record.trainNumber, record);
      }
    }
    
    // Update train current_mileage
    for (const [trainNumber, record] of latestByTrain) {
      await this.db.update(trains)
        .set({ 
          currentMileageKm: record.odometerValue,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(trains.trainNumber, trainNumber));
    }
    
    // Update fleet mileage targets
    await this.db.execute(sql`SELECT update_fleet_mileage_targets()`);
  }
}
```

## 4.2.5 Unavailability Service (NEW v2.1)

### 4.2.5.1 Purpose

Track trains that are unavailable due to corrective maintenance, incidents, or other blocking factors. This service is **critical** for schedule validity - without it, the optimizer can schedule PMs for trains that are grounded for weeks.

### 4.2.5.2 Implementation

```typescript
interface UnavailabilityEvent {
  id: string;
  trainId: string;
  eventType: 'CORRECTIVE' | 'INCIDENT' | 'COLLISION' | 'VANDALISM' | 'EXTERNAL' | 'PLANNED_OUTAGE';
  status: 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED';
  restrictionLevel: 'RESTRICTED' | 'GROUNDED';
  
  reportedAt: Date;
  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
  actualReturnDate?: Date;
  
  sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO' | 'OCC' | 'MANUAL';
  externalReference?: string;   // Maximo WO number
  externalStatus?: string;      // Maximo status
  
  description?: string;
  failureCode?: string;
  affectedSystem?: string;
  
  blocksPmScheduling: boolean;
  blocksRunAssignment: boolean;
}

interface CreateUnavailabilityInput {
  trainId: string;
  eventType: UnavailabilityEvent['eventType'];
  restrictionLevel: UnavailabilityEvent['restrictionLevel'];
  estimatedReturnDate?: Date;
  estimatedRepairHours?: number;
  sourceSystem: UnavailabilityEvent['sourceSystem'];
  externalReference?: string;
  description?: string;
  affectedSystem?: string;
}

class UnavailabilityService {
  constructor(
    private db: Database,
    private alertService: AlertService,
    private auditService: AuditService
  ) {}
  
  /**
   * Create a new unavailability event (e.g., from Maximo webhook)
   */
  async createEvent(input: CreateUnavailabilityInput, userId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent> {
    const event = await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
      // 1. Create the unavailability event
      const [newEvent] = await tx
        .insert(unavailabilityEvents)
        .values({
          ...input,
          status: 'ACTIVE',
          reportedAt: new Date(),
          blocksPmScheduling: true,
          blocksRunAssignment: input.restrictionLevel === 'GROUNDED',
        })
        .returning();
      
      // 2. Update train fitness status (trigger handles this, but we can be explicit)
      await tx
        .update(trains)
        .set({
          fitnessStatus: input.restrictionLevel,
          fitnessNotes: input.description || `Unavailability: ${input.eventType}`,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(trains.id, input.trainId));
      
      // 3. Check for conflicts with scheduled PMs
      const conflicts = await this.checkPMConflicts(tx, input.trainId, input.estimatedReturnDate);
      
      return { event: newEvent, conflicts };
    });
    
    // Alert if PM conflicts exist
    if (event.conflicts.length > 0) {
      await this.alertService.send({
        type: 'UNAVAILABILITY_PM_CONFLICT',
        severity: 'WARNING',
        message: `Train ${event.event.trainId} unavailable - ${event.conflicts.length} scheduled PMs may be affected`,
        data: {
          trainId: event.event.trainId,
          eventId: event.event.id,
          conflictingPMs: event.conflicts.map(pm => ({
            pmId: pm.id,
            pmType: pm.pmTypeCode,
            targetDate: pm.targetDate
          }))
        }
      });
    }
    
    // Audit log
    await this.auditService.log({
      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
      entityId: event.event.id,
      action: 'CREATE',
      userId,
      newValues: event.event
    });
    
    return event.event;
  }
  
  /**
   * Resolve an unavailability event (train returns to service)
   */
  async resolveEvent(
    eventId: string, 
    actualReturnDate: Date, 
    userId: string,
    notes?: string
  ): Promise<void> {
    await this.db.transaction(async (tx) => {
      const [event] = await tx
        .select()
        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
      
      if (!event) {
        throw new NotFoundError(`Unavailability event ${eventId} not found`);
      }
      
      if (event.status === 'RESOLVED') {
        throw new ConflictError('Event already resolved');
      }
      
      // Update the event
      await tx
        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
        .set({
          status: 'RESOLVED',
          actualReturnDate,
          resolvedAt: new Date(),
          resolvedBy: userId,
          resolutionNotes: notes,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId));
      
      // Check if there are other active unavailability events for this train
      const otherActive = await tx
        .select({ count: count() })
        .from(unavailabilityEvents)
        .where(and(
          eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, event.trainId),
          eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
          ne(unavailabilityEvents.id, eventId)
        ));
      
      // If no other active events, restore train to FIT
      if (otherActive[0].count === 0) {
        await tx
          .update(trains)
          .set({
            fitnessStatus: 'FIT',
            fitnessNotes: null,
            updatedAt: new Date()
          })
          .where(eq(trains.id, event.trainId));
      }
    });
    
    await this.auditService.log({
      entityType: 'unavailability_event',
      entityId: eventId,
      action: 'RESOLVE',
      userId,
      newValues: { status: 'RESOLVED', actualReturnDate }
    });
  }
  
  /**
   * Get all active unavailability events (for optimizer input)
   */
  async getActiveUnavailability(depotId?: string): Promise<UnavailabilityEvent[]> {
    let query = this.db
      .select({
        event: unavailabilityEvents,
        train: {
          trainNumber: trains.trainNumber,
          fleetId: trains.fleetId,
          currentDepotId: trains.currentDepotId
        }
      })
      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
      .innerJoin(trains, eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trains.id))
      .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'));
    
    if (depotId) {
      query = query.where(eq(trains.currentDepotId, depotId));
    }
    
    const results = await query;
    return results.map(r => ({
      ...r.event,
      trainNumber: r.train.trainNumber,
      fleetId: r.train.fleetId
    }));
  }
  
  /**
   * Check if a specific train is available on a specific date
   */
  async isTrainAvailable(trainId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<{
    available: boolean;
    blockingEvent?: UnavailabilityEvent;
  }> {
    const activeEvents = await this.db
      .select()
      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
      .where(and(
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.trainId, trainId),
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.status, 'ACTIVE'),
        or(
          isNull(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate),
          gte(unavailabilityEvents.estimatedReturnDate, targetDate)
        )
      ))
      .limit(1);
    
    if (activeEvents.length > 0) {
      return { available: false, blockingEvent: activeEvents[0] };
    }
    
    return { available: true };
  }
  
  /**
   * Process Maximo webhook for work order status change
   */
  async processMaximoWebhook(payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook): Promise<void> {
    // Map Maximo work types to our event types
    const eventTypeMap: Record<string, UnavailabilityEvent['eventType']> = {
      'CM': 'CORRECTIVE',
      'EM': 'CORRECTIVE',  // Emergency maintenance
      'IN': 'INCIDENT'
    };
    
    if (!eventTypeMap[payload.worktype]) {
      // Not a corrective maintenance type, ignore
      return;
    }
    
    // Check if we already have an event for this WO
    const existing = await this.db
      .select()
      .from(unavailabilityEvents)
      .where(and(
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.sourceSystem, 'MAXIMO'),
        eq(unavailabilityEvents.externalReference, payload.wonum)
      ))
      .limit(1);
    
    if (existing.length > 0) {
      // Update existing event based on Maximo status
      await this.updateFromMaximo(existing[0], payload);
    } else if (payload.status === 'WAPPR' || payload.status === 'INPRG') {
      // Create new unavailability event
      const train = await this.findTrainByAssetnum(payload.assetnum);
      if (!train) {
        this.logger.warn({ assetnum: payload.assetnum }, 'Unknown asset in Maximo webhook');
        return;
      }
      
      await this.createEvent({
        trainId: train.id,
        eventType: eventTypeMap[payload.worktype],
        restrictionLevel: 'GROUNDED',  // Default to grounded for CM
        estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
        sourceSystem: 'MAXIMO',
        externalReference: payload.wonum,
        description: payload.description
      });
    }
  }
  
  private async updateFromMaximo(
    event: UnavailabilityEvent, 
    payload: MaximoWorkOrderWebhook
  ): Promise<void> {
    const maximoStatusMap: Record<string, 'ACTIVE' | 'RESOLVED'> = {
      'WAPPR': 'ACTIVE',
      'APPR': 'ACTIVE',
      'INPRG': 'ACTIVE',
      'COMP': 'RESOLVED',
      'CLOSE': 'RESOLVED',
      'CAN': 'RESOLVED'
    };
    
    const newStatus = maximoStatusMap[payload.status] || 'ACTIVE';
    
    if (newStatus === 'RESOLVED' && event.status === 'ACTIVE') {
      await this.resolveEvent(
        event.id, 
        new Date(), 
        'SYSTEM_MAXIMO',
        `Resolved via Maximo status: ${payload.status}`
      );
    } else {
      // Update estimated return date if changed
      await this.db
        .update(unavailabilityEvents)
        .set({
          externalStatus: payload.status,
          estimatedReturnDate: payload.schedfinish ? new Date(payload.schedfinish) : undefined,
          updatedAt: new Date()
        })
        .where(eq(unavailabilityEvents.id, event.id));
    }
  }
  
  private async checkPMConflicts(
    tx: Transaction,
    trainId: string,
    estimatedReturnDate?: Date
  ): Promise<PMSchedule[]> {
    const endDate = estimatedReturnDate || addDays(new Date(), 90); // Default 90 days
    
    return tx
      .select()
      .from(pmSchedule)
      .where(and(
        eq(pmSchedule.trainId, trainId),
        eq(pmSchedule.status, 'SCHEDULED'),
        lte(pmSchedule.targetDate, endDate),
        isNull(pmSchedule.scenarioId)
      ));
  }
}

## 4.2.6 Service Demand Service (NEW v2.1)

### 4.2.6.1 Purpose

Manage fleet availability requirements by day type. This is a **hard constraint** for the optimizer - it cannot approve maintenance schedules that would violate minimum train availability.

  middayRequirement?: number;
  peakPmRequirement?: number;
  standbyBuffer: number;
}

  /**

   */
  async getDemand(fleetId: string, targetDate: Date): Promise<ServiceDemand> {
    const dayType = this.getDayType(targetDate);
    
    const demand = await this.db
      .select()
      .from(serviceDemand)
      .where(and(
        eq(serviceDemand.fleetId, fleetId),
        eq(serviceDemand.dayType, dayType),
        lte(serviceDemand.effectiveDate, targetDate)
      ))
      .orderBy(desc(serviceDemand.effectiveDate))
      .limit(1);

        id: 'default',
        fleetId,
        effectiveDate: targetDate,
        dayType,
        minTrainsRequired: Math.ceil(fleetSize * 0.85),
        standbyBuffer: 2
      };
    }
    
    return demand[0];
  }
